name: onchainos-verifiable-skills
description: This package mirrors the public `onchainos-skills` categories and adapts suitable OnchainOS API calls into verifiable flows built on `primus-zktls-core-sdk`. Read-heavy endpoints are usually the best default proof targets, while action-oriented endpoints can also be attested when the user wants the extra assurance.

scripts.test: node scripts/demo-okx-market-price.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-token-search.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-token-basic-info.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-wallet-token-balance.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-wallet-total-value.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-gas-price.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-gateway-supported-chains.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-swap-supported-chains.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-swap-liquidity.mjs --help && node scripts/demo-okx-swap-quote.mjs --help
